case_title: NICHOLAS STEBLENKO et al VS. BEN WONG

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT WONG, BEN MAILED TO RESPONDENT STEBLENKO, NICHOLAS SIDNEY, KAYLA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT STEBLENKO, NICHOLAS SIDNEY, KAYLA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WONG, BEN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, $500.00 CC 1950.5 BAD FAITH., TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SEVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED JUL-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANOLIK. PLAINTIFFS NICHOLAS STEBLENKO AND KAYLA SIDNEY PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEN WONG APPEARING. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESS ANDREW MULVANEY ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND RETURNED. CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES. DEPT 525.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY STEBLENKO, NICHOLAS SIDNEY, KAYLA AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALEX ANOLIK. FILED BY STEBLENKO, NICHOLAS SIDNEY, KAYLA WONG, BEN
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEBLENKO, NICHOLAS SIDNEY, KAYLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, BEN $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, TWO HUNDRED DOLLARS ($200.00) OF THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS STATUTORY DAMAGES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS' BECAUSE OF DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH C.C. 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH AS HE REFUSED TO REFUND ANY PART OF PLAINTIFFS' SECURITY DEPOSIT UNLESS PLAINTIFFS' SIGNED A STATEMENT ACCEPTING DEFENDANT'S UNWARRANTED CHARGES AGAINST PLAINTIFFS' SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
